channel.title: Rally News — Featured Stories
channel.description: The most uplifting and viral positive news stories, curated daily by Rally News.

item.title: Divers find five villagers alive in flooded Laos cave after more than a week
item.description: Five villagers who became trapped in a flooded cave in central Laos more than a week ago have been found alive by divers who discovered them sitting on a rock in the darkness, rescuers said Wednesday, but two others are still missing.
